hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"REMINDER: This project uses the obsidian-vault-workflow skill as the mandatory protocol for vault read/write. BEFORE any task: invoke the obsidian-vault-workflow skill, then locate/read the relevant topic file in vault/Meeting Notes/ (Overview + Open Questions + Session Log) plus 2-3 most recent Meeting Notes. AFTER any task: append a dated ### YYYY-MM-DD entry with [status] tag at the bottom of the topic file Session Log, update Open Questions, use [[wikilinks]] for cross-refs, and verify by reading back the file."}}'
